'''''Compton''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigate]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It appeared in a number of [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] training simulation missions involving an attack by [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bombers]] on an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] storage yard.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{C|simulation only}}
